rows.label: qev080403_MSG0001
rows.name:
It's fine that this girl Avi buys
weapons in large quantities, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0002
rows.name:
It seems her employer didn't give her that
much funding, so she keeps haggling, asking
me to sell at super bargain prices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm an employee too, so I understand
more than a little the suffering of
having unreasonable work forced upon you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0004
rows.name:
I want to give her a discount, but...
even so, that's just too cheap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0005
rows.name:
What's with that kid? The moment
the deal was struck, she ran off
like a frightened rabbit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0006
rows.name:
Is she really that busy? Even for
this weapon purchase, it seems she
wasn't given a decent budget...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0007
rows.name:
Poor thing. It looks like she
works at a pretty sketchy place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev080403_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about the delivery destination for the goods Lyvia bought.

rows.label: qev080403_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquiry

rows.label: qev080403_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about his relationship with Lyvia.

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0008
rows.name:
Let's see... She told me to deliver it
all to Wayne Cave in Bōkyaku no Keikoku.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0009
rows.name:
Recently she's become like a
regular customer and buys a lot
of weapons from me, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0010
rows.name:
Just what in the world are they
trying to do in a place like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0011
rows.name:
Are they gathering BLADE members
to do a mass subjugation of
native creatures or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0012
rows.name:
Recently she's been buying a lot
of weapons. Well, I guess you could
call her a regular customer?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0013
rows.name:
She seems enthusiastic about her
work. Isn't she a good kid?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0014
rows.name:
...However, it seems her employer is a strict
person, and she's always being badgered with
sarcastic remarks about her work being slow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0015
rows.name:
That's why I want to quickly arrange
the weapons and deliver them to Wayne
Cave in Bōkyaku no Keikoku for her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0016
rows.name:
It looks like her workplace is
there. Could it be a base for
a BLADE team or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0017
rows.name:
I need to hurry up and arrange
the weapons to deliver them to
Avi's workplace in Wayne Cave![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080403_MSG0018
rows.name:
Hehe. Before she ends up getting
scolded by that employer who forces
nothing but unreasonable work on her![ST:wait ]
